project.name: django-postalcodes-light
project.summary: Django app providing a lightweight data model for storing and querying postal codes with location data
project.description: django-postalcodes-light provides a simple Django data model for storing postal codes with place names and geographic coordinates. Used where services need to look up or validate postal codes without a heavyweight dependency. Fork of original package to add support for newer Django versions; not distributed via pypi, installed from git directly
